name: capture-object-photo
summary: Capture labeled photos of requested AI2-THOR objects as reusable skill behavior.

mcp.boundary_notes: Photo capture is a skill-level composite action. scene_objects and goto are privileged AI2-THOR helpers, not canonical robot capabilities.

scripts.purpose: Convert a scene_objects response into a deterministic label and goto/observe_archived route plan.

refactor_signals: multiple photo skills duplicate the same route planning script
the trace repeatedly needs a stable public photo capability with preserved substeps
promote_to_mcp_when: multiple skills need the same stable photo capability
inputs and outputs fit one contract profile
substeps remain visible in trace and reports
the implementation uses only public allowed information
